Container.Name: HotFetched
Container.Overview: 3D printer firmware configuration and build workshop. Marlin (PlatformIO compile) and Klipper (MCU firmware + printer.cfg generation) with per-board validation and confidence-gated builds.

Config.Name: Private data
Config.Description: SQLite DB, project sources, build artifacts. Keep on cache-only storage (NOT array/user-share) — same SQLite locking rule as FarFetched.

Config.Name: PlatformIO cache
Config.Description: Persists the STM32 toolchain (~1-2 GB) so it is not re-downloaded on container updates.
